required_spec: 1 in OD round dowel pakkawood, straight grain
search_terms: pakkawood dowel 1 inch, pakkawood rod, dymondwood
supplier_candidates: Cousineau Wood Products / Bell Forest Products / Specialty Wood
substitution_rule: Substitute hard maple or ebonized maple if pakkawood unavailable
risk_note: Pakkawood is dyed and resin-stabilized; check reaction to CA glue.

required_spec: C26000 cartridge brass shim, 0.008 in x 6 in x 12 in
substitution_rule: Phosphor bronze 0.008 in acceptable; tone slightly different
risk_note: Thicker shim raises reed pitch and increases blowing pressure.

required_spec: 5 in OD x 8 in L walnut, kiln-dried
supplier_candidates: Bell Forest Products / Got Wood / WoodCraft
substitution_rule: Cherry or maple acceptable; padauk for premium build
risk_note: Avoid green wood; gourd will check.

required_spec: 1 lb yellow beeswax block, food grade
search_terms: beeswax block 1 lb yellow food grade
risk_note: Pure paraffin is too brittle and does not hold reed seal.
Bowmaker's rosin is too soft for permanent seals.

required_spec: Boxwood or buffalo horn 0.5 in OD x 2 in L
search_terms: boxwood dowel half inch / buffalo horn rod
substitution_rule: Maple or boxwood acceptable; horn is traditional

search_terms: luthier needle file set fine cut
substitution_rule: Diamond burr set acceptable for fine work

required_spec: C26000 brass, 0.040 in x 6 in x 12 in
risk_note: Aluminum plates flex more; brass preferred for production.
